displayTitle: Return of the Jedi: The Rebellion #1
synopsis:
**The 40th Anniversary Celebration of Return of the Jedi**

**Mon Mothma Must Die!**

Admiral Ackbar is the only one with the knowledge of the Empire's plans to kill Mon Mothma. Enter Poe Dameron's parents, Shara Bey and Kes Dameron, to thwart the threat! But do they have what it takes to take down the unknown assassin in time?
title: Return of the Jedi: The Rebellion #1
